for a one-month supply of drugs. This estimate should be based on available plan data (such as the 
most current 6 months of PDE data) for retail pharmacies only. Neither retail extended day supply nor 
mail order location data should be included in the estimate. 

Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. The INPP are currently referred 
to as preferred pharmacies within split networks. There is no change in the meaning of the variable,
